svg.title: UDA-Hub Multi-Agent Architecture
svg.desc: LangGraph-powered multi-agent system showing ticket ingestion, supervisor routing, specialized agents, tools, memory layers, and output.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the ticket input format and metadata')
sendPrompt('What does the Supervisor agent do in UDA-Hub?')
g.text: Orchestrates routing and decides next step

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the Classifier agent do in UDA-Hub?')
sendPrompt('What does the Resolver agent do in UDA-Hub?')
sendPrompt('What does the Escalation agent do in UDA-Hub?')
sendPrompt('How does RAG work in UDA-Hub?')
sendPrompt('What tools can the Resolver use in UDA-Hub?')
sendPrompt('How does short-term memory work in UDA-Hub?')
sendPrompt('How does long-term memory work in UDA-Hub?')
sendPrompt('What does the output of UDA-Hub look like?')
